channel.title: Profisee Group, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Profisee Group, Inc. (profisee).

item.title: CVE-2025-6240 · 5 MEDIUM — Profisee Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in Profisee on Windows (filesystem modules) allows Path Traversal after authentication to the Profisee system.This issue affects Profisee: from 2020R1 before 2024R2.
